projectDescription: A B2B SaaS platform that transforms screen recordings into AI-narrated product demo videos, step-by-step docs, and GIFs — and deploys them as intelligent, 24/7 lead qualification experiences.
keyFeatures: AI Script Enhancement — removes filler words, rewrites narration as clear benefit-driven copy
AI Voiceover — auto-synced professional voice in 39+ languages from a single recording
Visual Effects — 8 production-grade effects including Zoom & Blur, Spotlight, Arrows, Motion Scenes
Multilingual Support — translate and re-voice content into 39+ languages
Templates — launch-ready structures for product demos, onboarding, and sales content
Multi-Format Export — simultaneous Video (MP4), Step-by-Step Doc, and GIF from one project
AI Demo Agent — conversational qualifier that greets prospects, asks qualifying questions, and routes content
Three Sharing Modes — Static Playlist, Conversational Playlist, AI Demo Agent Guided Session
Lead Intelligence — structured buyer profiles with qualification scores (0–100), content engagement, and Q&A logs
Access Control — open, credential-based, and verified/whitelisted tiers
Custom Branding & Domain — white-label Hub on your own subdomain with full brand kit
CRM Integrations — native HubSpot and Salesforce sync with custom properties
Slack Alerts — real-time hot-lead and meeting-booked notifications
Calendly Integration — in-session meeting booking CTA synced to CRM
Zapier — 5,000+ app automation via session-completion triggers
Analytics Dashboard — session metrics, content engagement, audience intelligence, and revenue attribution
publicApiSurface: GET /sessions — list Hub sessions and lead intelligence data
Zapier triggers: Session Completed, Hot Lead Completed Session, Meeting Booked, Trial Started, New Lead Identified
Zapier fields: visitor_email, visitor_name, visitor_company, qualification_score, session_name, content_watched, questions_asked, cta_outcome, meeting_date, lead_intelligence_url
HubSpot custom properties: dk_qualification_score, dk_last_session_date, dk_content_watched, dk_questions_asked, dk_session_outcome
Salesforce custom fields: DemoKraft_Qualification_Score__c, DemoKraft_Last_Session_Date__c, DemoKraft_Session_Outcome__c, DemoKraft_Content_Watched__c, DemoKraft_Questions_Asked__c
Webhook payload — JSON on session completion (configurable events)
Embed <iframe> — responsive/fixed embed for Hub playlists and sessions
Custom Domain CNAME — cname.demokraft.ai with auto-provisioned SSL
Email sender customisation via SPF/DKIM DNS records
